title: Panevėžys、Panevėžys County — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Panevėžys、Panevėžys Countyの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

PanevėžysはPanevėžys Countyにある人口92,000の都市です。A city in northern Lithuania, known for its theater and cultural scene, the Cido Arena, and a strong industrial and manufacturing heritage.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
